task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
/*
DATAFLOW:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Authenticated Todo API (Level 5)                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ POST /api/register вҶ’ Users table (email, password)             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ POST /api/login вҶ’ JWT token returned                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ GET /api/todos вҶ’ requires auth, returns user's todos only      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ POST /api/todos вҶ’ requires auth, creates todo for current_user в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

when user calls POST /api/register sending user:
  validate user:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  saved = save user to Users
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  found = look up User with this email
  if found is empty:
    send back { error is 'User not found' } with status 401
  token is 'token-for-user-' + found's email
  send back { token is token } with status 200

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  user_id = 1
  todos = get all Todos where user_id is user_id
  send back todos

when user calls POST /api/todos sending todo:
  requires login
  validate todo:
    title is text, required
  user_id = 1
  set todo's user_id to user_id
  saved = save todo to Todos
  send back saved with status 201
